Thought 4: The murder weapon was a shotgun, and Meredith has a shotgun, shooting experience, and access to the weapon. She was also seen near the crime scene around the time of the murder by a witness (Jerry the birdwatcher). Additionally, she had a strong motive due to Frances blackmailing her about her illicit pet trade. Kinsley was present in the forest but has no direct link to the shotgun or any clear evidence placing him at the crime scene with a weapon. His motive is less direct (Frances was investigating his gang ties), and his alibi seems consistent. Therefore, Meredith is the most likely murderer.
